name: Stair Tap
short_description: Tap your way through never-ending staircases, racing to the top before your time runs out!
detailed_description:
Tap your way through never-ending staircases, racing to the top before your time runs out!

Stair Tap is a game of fast reflexes and fast fingers. Your objective is to speed your way to the top with various challenges such as lava, time limits, and crashing.

Stair Tap offers a variety of game modes, including:

  • Classic - The classic gameplay

  • Race - Race to the 200th stair before your time runs out

  • Rising Lava - Escape the lava in a never-ending loop

  • Lights Out - Scale your way through the darkness

  • Flipped - Classic.. But sideways!

  • Freebie - Enjoy some free money

  • Endless - Do whatever!

Can you get the fastest time?

This game is heavily inspired by the game "Stair Tappers".
